name: Claw3D
description: Integration with Claw3D — a 3D virtual office platform. Provides tools to send office messages, query office layout, manage studio settings, and interact with the Claw3D REST API.

baseUrl.description: Base URL of the Claw3D instance (default: http://localhost:3000)

baseUrl.label: Claw3D Base URL
baseUrl.help: HTTP URL of the running Claw3D Next.js server (e.g. http://localhost:3000)
